_readme: Fallback registry, keyed by 5-digit county FIPS code. Used only when ArcGIS Online discovery (parcel_agent/discovery.py) finds nothing for a jurisdiction. Every entry is re-verified live (via describe_service) before use, so a stale or wrong URL just fails over to the next strategy rather than returning bad data. Populate this by finding the county's parcel FeatureServer URL (county open-data portal, or search https://www.arcgis.com for '<county> parcels') and adding an entry like the example below.

_example__do_not_use.name: Example County, ST
_example__do_not_use.notes: Replace this with a real, verified entry. Remove the leading underscore only if you rename the key to a real FIPS code.
